hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code ждёт ответа" with title "NEURO COMMENTING"'

echo 'CRITICAL REMINDERS after compaction:
- NEVER call send_code_request on purchased sessions
- NEVER connect multiple accounts from same IP (1 IP = 1 account)
- NEVER change profile immediately after connecting
- SetTypingRequest BEFORE every send_message
- Active hours: 8:00-23:00 MSK only
- 14-day warmup: readonly(0-2) → reactions(3-4) → light/3(5-7) → moderate/8(8-14) → full/35(15+)

- User language: Russian. Main interface: Telegram bot (not CLI)'
